name: The Covenant
playStyle: Support and control. Buff and debuff heavy with damage-over-time focus. Rewards patient, methodical play.
remnantRelation: Research material. Technological advancement sanctioned by the god. No theological conflict — pure utility.
amplificationType: Precision. Less raw output than other factions, more control over what gets amplified and how.

consequenceVariable.label: Caevyn Proximity
consequenceVariable.description: Tracks decisions that pull Caevyn toward the mission site. Determines death location.

name: The Syndicate
playStyle: Direct and ranged. Generalist toolbox with light buff and debuff capability. Rewards adaptability and information use.
remnantRelation: Commodity and leverage. Priced and positioned commercially. Control access, create dependency.
amplificationType: Controlled. Precision amplification — not the strongest output, but the most manageable.

consequenceVariable.label: Syndicate Distrust
consequenceVariable.description: Tracks decisions signaling the commander operates outside expected parameters. Determines mission 3 stacking.

name: The Eternal Vrath
playStyle: Close range, direct damage. Almost no buffs or debuffs. Rewards aggression and forward pressure.
remnantRelation: Amplification equipment. Makes soldiers hit harder. That is the entirety of the interest.
amplificationType: Raw and overwhelming. The highest output of any faction. Unsubtle.

consequenceVariable.label: Cultural Disrespect
consequenceVariable.description: Tracks decisions that fail to demonstrate understanding of Vrath values. Determines defection rate in mission 3.

name: The Pirates
playStyle: Eclectic and unpredictable. Slightly stronger than equivalent faction units. No doctrine — just results.
remnantRelation: Contract targets. The buyer pays; the crew delivers. The crew does not ask what the buyer wants them for.
amplificationType: Varied. Multi-species crew means remnant amplification affects different crew members differently.

consequenceVariable.label: Captain Trust
consequenceVariable.description: Tracks decisions that build or erode Halloran's trust in the commander. Determines mission 3 crew support.
